query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent = 1 OR contentConsent = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_true,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent = 0 OR contentConsent = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_false,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_null,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM sports_day_registrations;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.47e60b4ce122 --database 6SwZoJcoJNmN362a73ncsK --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent = 1 OR contentConsent = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_true,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent = 0 OR contentConsent = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_false,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentConsent IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consent_null,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM sports_day_registrations;
